title: Multicolor Number 9 Glitter Birthday Candle (19cm) 1 Count - Vibrant Celebration Candle for Any Events
features: NUMBER 9 BIRTHDAY CANDLE: Celebrate in style with our multicolor number 9 glitter birthday candle. The perfect addition to any cake for a spectacular celebration.

VIBRANT MULTICOLOR DESIGN: Make a statement with our eye-catching multicolor candle, designed to add a burst of color and excitement to any event. Ideal for birthday parties, anniversaries, and milestone achievements.
DAZZLING GLITTER FINISH: Add a sparkle to your celebration with our glitter-enhanced candle - provides a radiant shine and brightens up any cake or dessert while capturing the perfect event photos.
LARGE CANDLE: Our generously-sized candle measures 19cm in length, ensuring it stands out on any cake while providing a memorable and fun-filled moment for all guests to enjoy.

EASY TO USE: This pack contains 1 multicolor glitter number 9 candle, designed for quick and effortless placement on your cake. Easy to light and remove, it's the ultimate hassle-free accessory for your special celebration.
description: From the manufacturer Glitter Numeral Candles Show your age in colourful fashion with these bright and vibrant candles! These glitter candles are an ideal addition to any Birthday, so make a wish and blow out the candles!
